info.name: CADT Project API
info.description: Complete API collection for the CADT PDF Library project. Uses Sanctum token authentication. Set the `token` variable after sign-in to access authenticated routes.

item.name: Auth (Public)

request.description: Register a new user account. Password must be 8-15 chars with at least 1 uppercase, 1 digit, and 1 special character.
Sign in and receive a Sanctum token. Copy the `token` value from the response into the `token` environment variable for authenticated requests.
Verify user email via signed URL. The actual URL with the correct hash and signature is sent via email.
Resend the email verification link. Throttled to 3 requests per minute.
Send a password reset link to the user's email.
Set a new password using the reset token sent via email.
Redirect to Google OAuth login page.
Handle Google OAuth callback. Not directly testable in Postman — use a browser.

item.description: Authentication endpoints that do not require a token.

item.name: Auth (Authenticated)

request.description: Revoke the current Sanctum token and mark logout in login history.
Check if the current token is valid and return user info.
Revoke the current token and issue a new one.
Change password. Requires old password. If terminate_sessions is true, all tokens are revoked.
Create a password for users who signed up via Google OAuth (no password set).
Update user profile photo. Send base64-encoded image string. Accepted formats: png, jpg, jpeg.

item.description: Authentication endpoints that require a valid Sanctum token.

item.name: Users & Profile

request.description: Get a list of all users.
Get the authenticated user's profile including favorites and device logs.
Update the authenticated user's display name.
Update about_me text and interest tags.
Get the authenticated user's favorite books.
Get the authenticated user's device login history.
Get all available interest tags.
Get the user's tag interests with computed scores (based on favorites, views, etc).
Get personalized book recommendations based on user interests.
Get overall popular book recommendations.
Get books with similar titles to the given book.

item.description: User profile, favorites, logs, and recommendations.

query.description: Search by title, slug, author, or tags
all | favorite | new | popular | new_release_section | popular_section

request.description: Get paginated list of items/books with optional search and filter.
Create a new book/item. Uses multipart/form-data for file uploads.
Get a single item/book with category, author, and tags.
Update an existing book/item.
Delete a book/item and its associated files.
Get all categories sorted by name.
Create a new category. Slug is auto-generated from name if not provided.
Update an existing category.
Delete a category.
Get all tags with optional search.
Create a new tag.
Get a single tag.
Update a tag (supports PUT and PATCH).
Delete a tag.
Search books by title, description, author, category, or tags.
Get trending search terms.
Get suggested/recommended books for the user.
Get the authenticated user's favorite books.
Check if a book is in the user's favorites.
Add a book to the user's favorites.
Remove a book from the user's favorites.
Get all tags associated with a book.
Replace all tags on a book with the given tag IDs (syncs relationship).
Attach a single tag to a book without detaching existing ones.
Remove a specific tag from a book.
Get view count for a book including total views, unique users, and current user's views.

item.name: PDF Progress

request.description: Get all PDF reading progress records for the authenticated user. Includes book info (title, cover, author, category, tags).
Get reading progress for a specific book or document.
Save or update PDF reading progress. If a record for the user + item already exists, it will be updated.

item.description: Track PDF reading progress per user.

item.name: PDF Comments & Highlights

request.description: Get all comments and highlights for a document, with optional filters.
Create a new PDF comment or highlight.
Get a single PDF comment/highlight by ID.
Update an existing PDF comment/highlight.
Delete a PDF comment/highlight.

item.description: Manage comments and highlights on PDF documents.

request.description: Serve a PDF file from storage. The path is URL-encoded and relative to storage/app/public/. Supports CORS and caching.
Get all notifications for the authenticated user (auto-deletes notifications older than 14 days).
Mark a single notification as read.
Mark all notifications as read.
Delete all notifications for the authenticated user.
Get the last 5 login history entries for the authenticated user.
Get the current login session details.
Get all permissions. In Vue frontend, this is also used to load the user's permission set for route guarding.
Get a simplified list of permissions.
Get a single permission by ID.
Create a new permission. Type: 1=Menu, 2=Submenu, 3=Action.
Update an existing permission.
Delete a permission.
Get all users who have permissions assigned, with their permissions.
Get a specific user's permissions.
Assign permissions to a user (replaces all existing permission assignments).
Update a user's permission assignments (replaces all).
Remove all permissions from a user.
Get paginated list of chats the user is a member of.
Create a new chat. Type: 'personal' (max 1 user_id) or 'group' (requires name). user_ids must not include yourself.
Get chat details by ID.
Update a group chat's name or photo. Only the admin can update.
Delete a chat. Only the admin can delete.
Leave a group chat.
Read a file from a chat (images, documents, etc). The folder parameter is the file type plural (images, documents, videos).
Get paginated messages for a chat.
Send a text message to a chat.
Send a file message (document, image, or video) to a chat.
Update a chat message. Only the message author can update.
Delete a chat message. Only the message author can delete.
Mark a specific message as seen.
Mark all messages in a chat as seen.
Get all members of a chat.
Add new members to a group chat.
Remove a member from a group chat.
Get detailed list of all users (admin only).
Get detailed info about a specific user (admin only).
Create a new user (admin only).
Update a user's details (admin only).
Delete a user (admin only).
Get all backup files with size and date info (admin only).
Create a new backup (admin only). Flag: 'full', 'db', or 'files'.
Download a specific backup file (admin only).
Delete a specific backup file (admin only).
